case_title: PAULO MALBAS VS. FORTE'PROTECTIVE SERVICES, INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALBAS, PAULO AS TO DEFENDANT FORTE'PROTECTIVE SERVICES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
